value.found_quote: ## Multi-Agent Teamwork (Ultra Plan Only)\n\nAntigravity 2.0 introduces advanced multi-agent orchestration for extremely complex tasks. ... Using `/teamwork-preview` prompts the main agent to launch a collaborative multi-agent framework. This framework features built-in error recovery, automatic retries, and coordination logic, allowing you to simply define the high-level goal while the platform manages the overhead of a cooperative agent team.
value.rationale: The page describes "Multi-Agent Teamwork" as advanced multi-agent orchestration with built-in error recovery, automatic retries, and coordination logic, matching the claim. It also describes synchronous and asynchronous agent operation. The `/teamwork-preview` command is stated to be in preview and exclusive to the Ultra plan, so lifecycle is preview.
